description_long: This object is a robust axe featuring a dark, slightly curved wooden handle with a smooth ergonomic grip, transitioning into a broad, heavy metal head. The axe head is rectangular with a pronounced cutting edge and a flat poll, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. Subtle decorative engravings or patterns are visible on the side of the blade, adding a touch of craftsmanship. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the axe head using a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall finish of the axe is matte, with the metal blade showing a hard, slightly reflective surface and the handle displaying a natural wood grain. This tool is designed for heavy-duty use, likely in urban maintenance, emergency, or utility contexts.
description: A sturdy axe with a dark, curved wooden handle and a broad, engraved metal blade, designed for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, engraved metal blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile of the handle and the thin edge of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the cutting edge of the blade and the handle's grip section.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and a smooth, natural finish.
attribute_blade_design: Rectangular, single-edged steel blade with a flat poll and decorative engravings on the side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle fitted into the blade eye.
